output_debit_classifier.reason: Atlas Van Lines made three asset purchases: office desks ($2,000), computers ($3,500), and a crane-equipped truck ($250,000). The desks and computers were paid in cash (total $5,500), while the truck was purchased on account. All three purchases increase asset accounts (Office Furniture/Equipment, Computer Equipment, and Vehicles/Trucks). The cash payment decreases the Cash asset account, and the credit purchase increases Accounts Payable liability.
